title: Bridge Essay: Embodied cognition and the perception-action link.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Mind as Computer Critique** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** 4E cognition — embodied, embedded, enactive, extended mind; critique of computationalism.

**Embodied cognition and the perception-action link.** — Phys Life Rev. PMID: 21257354. DOI: 10.1016/j.plrev.2011.01.002. Perception is interpreted as aset of capabilities that facilitate two functions necessary for survival; learning about the environment and controlling real-time behavioral interactions with it. Perceptual capabilities evolve in the context of an organism and its environment, adapted to an organism'secological niche. The relation between embodied perception and action can be studied in the context of the only muscles that serve only to enable perception--the eye muscles. The only eye movements...

notes: Auto-acquired from PubMed/MEDLINE on 2026-07-12. Phase 3 (Mind as Computer Critique). Evaluation: Good (score=2.2)
